content_body:
SMS Terms & Conditions 


By opting into our text messaging services, you consent to receive promotional and reservation-related messages from Cabin Rentals of Georgia. Message frequency may vary, and standard message and data rates may apply. To opt-out, reply "STOP" at any time to cease receiving promotional messages. For help, reply "HELP" or contact us at info@cabin-rentals-of-georgia.com or call (706) 432-2140. Your privacy is important to us. We do not share, sell, or distribute your text messaging opt-in data or consent to third parties.
title: Terms and Conditions
